leadText: Secret Islet (Japanese: ひみつの小島 Secret Islet) is a location in Hoenn with one Secret Spot where a Secret Base can be made. Other than Flying and soaring, it can only be accessed by surfacing from the southwestern underwater area on Route 126, in turn accessed by the small Dive spot in the southwest of Route 126.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] The Secret Islet is a small island with a lone tree in the center. There is one Secret Spot here. Flying or soaring to the area, the player will land several tiles south of the tree. There are no Trainers , wild Pokémon , or items here.
